scripts.dev: node server/clear-dev-port.js && concurrently -k -n server,web -c cyan,blue "pnpm run server" "node server/wait-for-dev-port.js && vite --host 127.0.0.1"
scripts.test: tsx --test server/defaultWorld.test.js server/saveManager.test.js server/worldTime.test.js server/presentationState.test.js server/presentationPortraits.test.js server/worldAgentPortraits.test.js server/inventory.test.js src/components/sceneMapLayout.test.js src/components/characterHealthChange.test.js src/components/characterAttackFeedback.test.js src/components/playerStatusHud.test.ts src/components/portraitState.test.ts src/components/stageCharacterSelection.test.js src/components/inventoryTargeting.test.ts src/lib/inventoryItemReferences.test.js src/lib/worldAgentRealtimeSync.test.js
